title: Presidential Nominations Submitted to Senate for Confirmation
summary: Notification of individuals nominated by the President for various federal positions requiring Senate confirmation, including appointments to ambassadorial roles and positions within executive branch departments and agencies. The nominations submitted include David Brat of Virginia for U.S. Ambassador to Australia, Hal Duncan of Texas for Deputy Director of the Office of Management and Budget, and Sean Kaufman of Georgia for Assistant Secretary for Preparedness and Response at the Department of Health and Human Services, among other nominations and any associated withdrawals of previous nominations.

title: Presidential Nominations Submitted to the Senate for Confirmation
summary: This document contains a list of individuals nominated by the President for various federal positions requiring Senate confirmation. The nominees include Riley Barnes of Texas for Director of the Peace Corps, Rudolph Bauer of South Carolina for Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary to Belize, and Don Richard Berthiaume Jr. of Virginia for Inspector General of the Department of Justice, among others. These nominations are submitted to the Senate for the confirmation process as required by the Constitution.

title: Presidential Permit for Enbridge Energy Limited Partnership to Operate Pipeline Facilities at U.S.-Canada Border
summary: Presidential permit issued to Enbridge Energy, Limited Partnership, a Delaware limited partnership, authorizing the operation and maintenance of three existing pipeline facilities located at Pembina County, North Dakota, at the international boundary between the United States and Canada. The permit grants authority to the permittee to conduct specified activities related to these cross-border pipeline infrastructure assets, subject to conditions set forth in the permit document.
